name: Endy Hybrid Mattress
introText: The Endy Hybrid combines individually wrapped coils with Endy's signature foam layers, adding better edge support and airflow to the original foam design for $1,175 CAD (Queen).
whatWorks: Individually wrapped coils improve edge support dramatically over the foam original — couples who use the full width of the mattress and side-sleepers who sit on the edge benefit significantly.
Coil layer increases airflow and reduces heat retention — the hybrid sleeps notably cooler than all-foam alternatives, making it the better choice for hot sleepers.
worthKnowing: Slightly less motion isolation than all-foam — coil springs transmit some movement between partners, though less than traditional innerspring mattresses.
$300 more than the Endy Original — if you sleep cool and don't need edge support, the Original provides similar comfort at lower cost.

commonComplaints.title: Motion transfer greater than foam original
commonComplaints.body: Individually wrapped coils still transfer more motion than the all-foam Endy Original. Light sleepers may prefer the foam.

commonComplaints.title: Price jump over the Original
commonComplaints.body: At $300 more, the Hybrid's improvements (edge support, cooling) may not justify the cost for solo sleepers or those who sleep cool.

commonComplaints.title: Heavier to move
commonComplaints.body: The coil layer adds significant weight — moving or rotating the mattress requires two people.

verdict: The Endy Hybrid is the better choice for couples, hot sleepers, and those who sleep near the edge — the coil layer solves the main limitations of the foam Original. If you sleep solo and sleep cool, save $300 with the Original.

realBuyers.quote: Switched from the Endy Original to the Hybrid. The edge support difference is night and day. Actually use the full width of the bed now.
Sleep so much cooler than on our old foam mattress. The hybrid airflow is a big improvement.
Canadian made, fast delivery, great trial. The hybrid is worth the extra money for two people.

metaDescription: Endy Hybrid Mattress review: foam + coils, medium firmness, 100-night trial. $1,175 CAD (Queen). Best Canadian hybrid mattress for couples and hot sleepers.
